ideation: This animation sequence aims to capture the sly, mischievous nature of the cat with wry smile emoji (😼).  The animation will focus on a slow, deliberate head tilt and a subtle shift in arm position to mimic a feline's playful attitude. The movements will be smooth, yet distinct. The robot's arms will move in a way that suggests both confidence and a hint of slyness. Frame 1 starts with the arms hanging down to set the stage. Frame 2 will have the robot tilt its head slightly to the right, while moving the left arm slightly forward and up. Frame 3 will show the head tilted further and the left arm moving slightly more up and forward. Frame 4 will show both arms raised slightly, the left arm more than the right. Frame 5 will show the robot's arms returning to a neutral position, completing the gesture.

frames.beat: arms hang down, a moment of stillness
left arm begins to rise, a subtle shift
the left arm lifts further, a playful curiosity
both arms raise slightly, a mischievous glint
arms return to rest, the sly smile fades
